author: Hans Kohlreiter
text: Implemented fix in cmd/repo_sync.go by refreshing remote workspace caches during sync via GetOrClone + Update before import. Added regression tests for cache refresh behavior, update-failure handling, and stale remote cache sync in cmd/repo_sync_test.go. Verified with: go test ./cmd -run 'TestPrepareRemoteSourcePath|TestRunSync_RemoteSourceRefreshesStaleCache'; go test ./cmd -run TestRunSync_MetadataCommitted; go test ./cmd
